briefdescription.para: important on Windows: in stream must be open in binary mode
important on Windows: in stream must be open in binary mode

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, const std::filesystem::path &path, const FaceBitSet *selection=nullptr, const char *serializeFormat=".mrmesh")
memberdef.name: serializeMesh

detaileddescription.para: saves mesh with optional selection to mru format; this is very convenient for saving intermediate states during algorithm debugging; ".mrmesh" save mesh format is not space efficient, but guaranties no changes in the topology after loading

briefdescription.para: saves an object into json value

detaileddescription.para: this version takes topology to convert MeshTriPoint in its representation relative a face; also beware that de-serialization will work only if faces are not renumbered (so please pack mesh before saving)
serialize given edges into json first converting them into pairs of vertices, which is safer when edge ids change after saving/loading, but vertex ids are not

briefdescription.para: loads an object from json value

detaileddescription.para: this version takes topology to construct MeshTriPoint from its representation relative a face; also beware that de-serialization will work only if faces are not renumbered (so please pack mesh before saving)

briefdescription.para: decompresses given zip-file into given folder

parameterdescription.para: if password is given then it will be used to decipher encrypted archive

briefdescription.para: decompresses given binary stream (containing the data of a zip file only) into given folder

parameterdescription.para: if password is given then it will be used to decipher encrypted archive

briefdescription.para: compresses given folder in given zip-file

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::filesystem::path &zipFile, const std::filesystem::path &sourceFolder, const std::vector< std::filesystem::path > &excludeFiles={}, const char *password=nullptr, ProgressCallback cb={})
memberdef.name: compressZip

briefdescription.para: compresses given folder in given zip-file

parameterdescription.para: files that should not be included to result zip
if password is given then the archive will be encrypted
an option to get progress notifications and cancel the operation
